penalties.description: No FLS task performance visible - video shows only product demonstration of laparoscopic instruments without any suturing, knot tying, or Penrose drain work.

reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as a promotional/demonstration video with no actual FLS task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored what appears to be instrument demonstration as task completion. The video contains no suture material, Penrose drain, marked targets, or laparoscopic trainer setup required for Task 4.
